en.text: bath,  a unit of liquid measure,  equal to dry measure ephah (about 9 imperial gallons or 40 litres,  rabbinical writings give sizes of one-half this amount)

senses.gloss_en: bath,  a unit of liquid measure,  equal to dry measure ephah (about 9 imperial gallons or 40 litres,  rabbinical writings give sizes of one-half this amount)
